challenge.title: Korak 5
challenge.description:
Trenutno, vaša adresa izgleda nepotpuna. Takođe želite dodati broj etaže gde živi zaposleni, pa stoga trebate izvršiti izmene.

Ako želite dodati sadržaj na kraju postojećeg niza znakova, možete koristiti izraz mgawo wa thamani ulioboreshwa ,+=. Ovo je kraće od pisanja var = var + 'new text'. Primer:

greeting = 'Hello'
greeting += ' World'
print(greeting) # Hello World

Zapamtite da se sekvenca slova ne može promeniti, stoga ova operacija ne menja originalnu sekvencu slova. Umesto toga, ona kreira novu sekvencu slova i postavlja je u izmene.

Koristi atribut += da dodaš niz znakova , Apartment 4B u tvoje izmene za address.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
first_name = 'John'
last_name = 'Doe'
print(first_name)
print(last_name)
full_name = first_name + ' ' + last_name
print(full_name)
address = '123 Main Street'  

print(address)

tests.text: Trebalo bi da koristiš atribut += za dodavanje sekvence slova , Apartment 4B u izmene address.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
first_name = 'John'
last_name = 'Doe'
full_name = first_name + ' ' + last_name
address = '123 Main Street'
address += ', Apartment 4B'
employee_age = 28
employee_info = full_name + ' is ' + str(employee_age) + ' years old'
print(employee_info)
experience_years = 5
experience_info = 'Experience: ' + str(experience_years) + ' years'
print(experience_info)
position = 'Data Analyst'
salary = 75000
employee_card = f'Employee: {full_name} | Age: {employee_age} | Position: {position} | Salary: ${salary}'
print(employee_card)
employee_code = 'DEV-2026-JD-001'
department = employee_code[0:3]
print(department)
year_code = employee_code[4:8]
initials = employee_code[9:11]
print(year_code)
print(initials)
last_three = employee_code[-3:]
print(last_three)
